data.name: Section1Intro
data.value: In compliance with Article 10 of Spanish Law 34/2002 of 11 July on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI), the following identification details are provided:

data.name: ActivityValue
data.value: Development and operation of automated cryptocurrency trading software

data.name: Section2Text
data.value: The owner provides automated cryptocurrency trading software services, including strategy configuration tools, market analysis and commission management, delivered entirely from Spain through digital platforms. These services do not constitute financial or investment advice and do not involve the management, custody or direct transfer of user funds.

data.name: Section3Text
data.value: All contents of the owner's websites — including texts, designs, source code, logos and images — are owned by Sergi Ortiz Gómez or are duly licensed for use. Reproduction, distribution, transformation or public communication without the express written authorisation of the owner is prohibited.

data.name: Section4Text
data.value: The trading software operates according to the settings configured by the user. The owner does not guarantee any profitability or outcome of the executed trades. No liability is assumed for losses arising from incorrect strategy configuration, technical failures of external exchanges, connectivity disruptions or any other circumstance beyond the provider's control.

data.name: Section5Text
data.value: This Legal Notice is governed by Spanish law. For the resolution of any dispute arising from access to or use of the owner's services, the parties submit, expressly waiving any other jurisdiction, to the Courts and Tribunals of the user's place of residence or, at the provider's option, to those of Las Palmas de Gran Canaria, Spain.
